'''Gebbu''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] art collector. [[Wac Bur]] sold him fake art in [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]], and so Gebbu sent [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] after him.

{{Char-stub}}
